ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the news program */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network broadcasting the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the program started broadcasting */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the program stopped broadcasting (if applicable) */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the television network */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the network */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the network */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the network */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the network was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program being rated */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the rating was recorded */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Viewer rating for the program in the city */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating data (e.g., Nielsen, internal survey) */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_slots" (
  "time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time slot */,
  "time_slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the time slot (e.g., 6:30 PM, 7:00 PM) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time slot */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_time_slots" (
  "program_time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between program and time slot */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time slot */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the program is aired in the time slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_time_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_time_slots_time_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_slot_id") REFERENCES time_slots ("time_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_time_slots_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, marketing manager, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program whose ratings were accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ratings */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ratings were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_demographics" (
  "program_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between program and demographic */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_demographics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
